name: quorum
description: A quorum of AI models (Codex, Gemini, Claude) for adversarial review and consultation in Claude Code
author: SimonRen

commands.name: multi-review
commands.description: Parallel standard + adversarial reviews from all available models (Codex, Gemini, Claude) on CC-produced work

commands.name: multi-consult
commands.description: Ask Codex, Gemini, and Claude the same question in parallel and synthesize a panel answer
